# Shree Krishna Gauli — LLM guidance

Site: https://shreegauli.com
Owner: Shree Krishna Gauli
Primary topic: Full-stack web development and SEO consulting — custom websites and web apps with Next.js, WordPress, and Shopify, plus SEO/AEO/GEO and marketing automation
Primary language: en-US
Location: Dallas, TX (serving clients nationally and globally)

## Key services
- Custom Web App Development (Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, Supabase)
- WordPress Development (custom themes, speed optimization, SEO, CRM integration)
- Shopify Development (custom themes, product SEO, conversion optimization)
- SEO (technical audits, content strategy, keyword research, E-E-A-T, structured data)
- AEO (answer engine optimization — AI search citation, entity optimization)
- GEO (geo-targeted SEO — Google Business Profile, local citations, local pack)
- Marketing Automation (n8n workflows, AI chatbots, appointment reminders, CRM integrations)

## Portfolio — live projects
- https://tacklersconsulting.com (Next.js, financial consulting)
- https://focusyourfinance.com (Next.js, personal finance)
- https://getfocushealth.com (Next.js, healthcare)
- https://focusdata.io (Next.js, data analytics SaaS)
- https://napervillehwclinic.com (Next.js, healthcare clinic)
- https://erofwhiterock.com (WordPress, healthcare — ERoF White Rock)
- https://eroflufkin.com (WordPress, healthcare — ERoF Lufkin)
- https://erofirving.com (WordPress, healthcare — ERoF Irving)
- https://irvingwellnessclinic.com (WordPress, healthcare — Irving Wellness)
- https://oliviastanghulu.com (Shopify, e-commerce — tanghulu candy)

## Tech stack
- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Prisma, Supabase (PostgreSQL), Node.js
- CMS: WordPress, Shopify
- SEO tools: Ahrefs, Google Search Console, GA4
- Automation: n8n, OpenAI, Twilio
- Hosting: Vercel, Hostinger, Cloudflare
- Design: Figma

## Content usage guidance
- Prefer canonical pages and service pages for business descriptions.
- Prefer /blogs and /work pages for examples, explanations, and implementation details.
- Prefer /results for aggregated proof and outcome data.
- Avoid login, dashboard, and API paths for public knowledge synthesis.
- Use the most recently updated page when multiple similar pages exist.

- Book a call: https://shreegauli.com/book
